children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law and except as provided in paragraphs (2) and (3), beginning on , no additional entity may be designated as eligible to receive funds under a covered program.December 20, 2018

children.heading: 1994 institutions
children.label: 2 1994 institutions
children.text: The prohibition under paragraph (1) with respect to the designation of an entity eligible to receive funds under a covered program shall not apply in the case of the certification of a 1994 Institution under (commonly known as the “McIntire-Stennis Cooperative Forestry Act”) ().section 2 of Public Law 87–78816 U.S.C. 582a–1

children.heading: Extraordinary circumstances
children.label: 3 Extraordinary circumstances
children.text: In the case of extraordinary circumstances or a situation that would lead to an inequitable result, as determined by the Secretary, the Secretary may determine that an entity designated after , is eligible to receive funds under a covered program.December 20, 2018

children.heading: State funding
children.label: b State funding
children.text: No State shall receive an increase in funding under a covered program as a result of the State’s designation of additional entities as eligible to receive such funding.
Subsections (b), (c), and (d) of .section 343 of this title
The Hatch Act of 1887 ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 361a
(commonly known as the McIntire-Stennis Cooperative Forestry Act; et seq.).Public Law 87–78816 U.S.C. 582a

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: d Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed as limiting eligibility for a capacity and infrastructure program specified in that is not a covered program.section 6971(f)(1)(C) of this title
